seoTitle: Berry Park vs Berthong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Berry Park and Berthong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Berry Park vs Berthong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Berry Park and Berthong.
heading: Berry Park vs Berthong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Berry Park, New South Wales and Berthong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Berthong has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Berry Park (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Berry Park or Berthong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Berry Park has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Berthong scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Berry Park scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Berthong scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Berry Park or Berthong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Berthong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
